articles.title: Elon Musk Replaces Twitter Logo With Dogecoin Logo, DOGE Price Surges over 20%
articles.description: Dogecoin got a big bump on Monday when Twitter replaced its familiar logo with the cryptocurrency’s emblem of a shiba inu dog’s head and torso.

articles.title: Dogecoin skyrockets as Crypto Twitter wonders what Elon is doing with logo
articles.description: Dogecoin shot up almost 14% on Monday after Twitter's blue bird logo was changed on the website for some users to the famed meme of a Shiba Inu dog.

articles.title: Dogecoin rallies 30% after Twitter logo changes to DOGE
articles.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) rallied roughly 30% on the 1-hour candle to $0.09796 after Twitter’s website logo changed to the meme coin.

articles.title: Dogecoin skyrockets after Musk randomly changes Twitter icon to Dogecoin
articles.description: Meme cryptocurrency has witnessed a sudden market boom as the price of Dogecoin (DOGE) started to climb sharply on Monday. … Continued

articles.title: Elon Musk changes Twitter icon to Doge after seeking lawsuit dismissal
articles.description: The American billionaire is being sued for $258 billion in a racketeering lawsuit alleging Musk ran a pyramid scheme to support Dogecoin.

articles.title: Breaking: Dogecoin Surges as Doge Replaces Bird Logo on Twitter
articles.description: In an unexpected turn of events, Twitter's well-known bird logo has been replaced with the internet sensation Doge, driving Dogecoin's value up by 8%

articles.title: Dogecoin Soars After Twitter Replaces Its Blue Bird Logo With the Token's Dog
articles.description: Twitter CEO Elon Musk in the past has shown himself to be a fan of the meme coin.

articles.title: Musk asks court to dismiss $258B DOGE racketeering lawsuit
articles.description: Elon Musk’s lawyers have filed a motion to dismiss the $258 billion racketeering lawsuit related to his tweets and mentions of Dogecoin (DOGE).

articles.title: Arbitrum Trading Volume Balloons Over 75% As ARB Price Defies FUD
articles.description: Arbitrum, a layer 2 blockchain that airdropped over 1 billion ARBK tokens to its community in March, has been the subject of negative news over the weekend. The Arbitrum Foundation came under fire for spending tokens without the approval of its holders, sparking Fear, Uncertainty, and Doubt (FUD) for the asset. However, ARB has refused […]

articles.title: Solana (SOL) Surpasses Ethereum (ETH) in Monthly Active Addresses: Details
articles.description: Ethereum (ETH) flipped by Solana (SOL) in monthly active addresses

articles.title: Ethereum MEV bots lose over $25 million in sophisticated attack
articles.description: A sophisticated attack on Ethereum led to a loss of over $25 million for a group of MEV bots trying to capture arbitrage opportunities.

articles.title: Here's How Cardano (ADA) Beats Ethereum (ETH), Explains Charles Hoskinson
articles.description: Charles Hoskinson explains why ADA is superior to Ethereum (ETH) in staking
